<Cast Animation: 0> 
<quality:4>
<dj:1>

<pos=APs text=\c[1]伤害:2000+物理伤害x2 size=16 color=rgba(255,255,255,1) line=false align=0>
<pos=APs text=\c[5]流派:体术 size=16 color=rgba(255,255,255,1) line=false align=0>
<setup action>
display action
immortal: targets, true
</setup action>

<target action>
if user.attackMotion() !== 'missile'
move user: targets, front, 10
else
perform start
end
wait for movement
motion attack: user
wait: 15
attack animation: target
wait for animation
action effect
</target action>

if(foes.aliveMembers().length>2){//敌人大于2选两个不同目标
        tlist = tlist.sort(function(){return Math.random()-0.5});
        targets.push(tlist[0]);
        targets.push(tlist[1]);
}else{//只有一个敌人就只有一个目标
        targets=tlist;
}   
  </Custom Target Eval>

description:
